use_cases: Explaining a 3-step onboarding or setup process on a landing page
Showcasing feature highlights in a product tour section
Presenting service workflows in a step-by-step visual format
Displaying benefits alongside process steps for user guidance
Creating a clear process overview for complex SaaS features
ai_summary: A responsive How It Works section component that displays a 3-step process flow with icon cards, titles, descriptions, and bullet-point benefits. Styled with shadcn/ui theme variables supporting light and dark modes, featuring hover animations with scale and shadow effects for interactive engagement. Designed as a generic process explanation component suitable for landing pages, product tours, and service showcases.
